message:
feat(connectors): add Crush connector for Charm's AI coding agent

Implements a new connector for Charm's Crush AI coding agent, which
stores session data in SQLite databases at ~/.crush/crush.db (global)
and .crush/crush.db (per-project).

Schema support:
- sessions table: id, title, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, cost
- messages table: session_id FK, role, parts (JSON array), created_at
  (ms), model, provider
- Text content extracted from parts entries where type == "text"

Discovery:
- Global database via CRUSH_SQLITE_DB env var or ~/.crush/crush.db
- Per-project databases via .crush/crush.db in cwd
- Canonical slug aliases: "crush", "charm-crush"

Feature-gated behind "crush" feature flag (requires rusqlite).
Added to the all-connectors feature set. Registered in the connector
factory, slug canonicalization, known connectors list, default probe
roots, and default probe paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,8 +53,10 @@ chatgpt = ["connectors", "dep:aes-gcm", "dep:base64"]
 cursor = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # OpenCode: SQLite database access for v1.2+ opencode.db
 opencode = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite"]
+# Crush: SQLite database access for Charm's Crush agent
+crush = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite"]
 # All connectors enabled
-all-connectors = ["connectors", "chatgpt", "cursor", "opencode"]
+all-connectors = ["connectors", "chatgpt", "cursor", "opencode", "crush"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile = "3"
